summary: Restore flexible open-palm page swipes while leaving strict OK pinch navigation unchanged.
scope: Use the mirrored palm center over a recent 360ms trajectory for page swipes.
Swipe right to page down and left to page up without requiring a screen-center crossing.
Keep horizontal dominance, cooldown, single-trigger and release-or-stability reactivation guards.
Leave pointing and Victory as status-only gestures while preserving strict OK scroll and navigation behavior.
validation: swift test passed 20 tests including both open-palm directions, cooldown, reactivation and inactive pointing/V gestures
TypeScript typecheck and 32 Web regression tests passed
Release app build and strict codesign verification passed
Installed bundle reports version 0.7.3 build 13 and MediaPipe GPU reached ready state at 26 FPS / 14.0ms during the final UI check
notes: Open-palm page swipes deliberately restore the pre-0.7.0 flexible distance-based behavior.
macos-v0.7.2 remains the rollback point before this interaction change.
